detail: Started a new test-guided pass using test sources and discovered test names only, without reading manual-spec artifacts.
Inspected API, basic, handshake, datagram, data, event, frame, range, TLS, congestion-control, datapath, and crypto unit/integration test files.

Grouped observed test coverage into 16 product features spanning API validation, lifecycle, listeners, connections, handshakes, versions, streams, events, buffers, datagrams, frames, ranges, congestion control, datapath, TLS/crypto, and diagnostics.
Validated both JSON indexes with python3 -m json.tool.
Test-guided specifications and bidirectional feature/test indexes were generated.
